name: gemini-antigravity
description: Local-first Gemini Anti Gravity Memory bridge for Gemini Anti Gravity with Obsidian vault transparency.

interface.shortDescription: Local recall and Gemini Anti Gravity-owned Obsidian memory
interface.longDescription: Gemini Anti Gravity Memory gives Gemini Anti Gravity transparent local recall, manual vault-first learning, and readable audit logs through a local MCP server. It talks to the existing Sovereign daemon and keeps expensive extraction out of v1.
defaultPrompt: Recall Gemini Anti Gravity Memory for this task
Learn this in the Gemini Anti Gravity vault
Show recent Gemini Anti Gravity Memory audit logs
